ValidationRule.description: Blocks Field values that are not text-shaped. Allowed: Text, Text Area, Long Text Area, URL, Encrypted, Email, Phone. Blank Field wildcards every text field on the object. Formulas pass this rule and are filtered at runtime.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Field__c)), NOT( OR( CONTAINS(LOWER(Field__r.DataType), "text"), CONTAINS(LOWER(Field__r.DataType), "url"), CONTAINS(LOWER(Field__r.DataType), "encrypted"), CONTAINS(LOWER(Field__r.DataType), "email"), CONTAINS(LOWER(Field__r.DataType), "phone") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Masking supports only text-shaped fields (Text, Text Area, Long Text Area, URL, Encrypted, Email, Phone). Pick a text field, leave blank to wildcard the object, or remove this target.
